{{Quote|The Mon Calamari system is still part of the Republic. This planet must not fall into Separatist hands.|[[Jedi Master]] [[Mace Windu]]|<ref name="Water War" />}}
The '''Mon Calamari system''',<ref name="Water War" /> also known as the '''Mon Cala system''',<ref name="Galactic Atlas">''[[Star Wars: Galactic Atlas]]''</ref> was a [[binary star]] [[Star system|system]] that contained the [[planet]] of [[Mon Cala]]. The [[Mon Calamari]] and [[Quarren]] [[species]] hailed from that system.<ref name="DB Dac" /> Mon Cala had a barren [[Mon Cala's moon|moon]] without an [[atmosphere]].<ref name="BMF 97">{{BuildFalconCite|97|Guide to the Galaxy}}</ref>

{{System-stub}}
